data.title: GitHub improves pull request experience with rich diffs for images and markdown, updated tree ordering, and better performance.
data.description: GitHub has introduced new features to the pull request 'Files changed' page, including rich image and markdown diffs, enhanced tree ordering, and improved performance. Users can now experience a more streamlined and visually appealing interface when reviewing changes. This update aims to provide a more efficient and user-friendly experience for developers on the platform.

data.title: GeForce NOW adds 12 games in August, with 'Grounded 2' access. New adventures and updates for popular titles.
data.description: In August, GeForce NOW is planning to enhance its game collection by introducing around twelve new titles, including an early preview of 'Grounded 2'. Gamers can look forward to exploring fresh adventures and updates for well-known games.

data.title: Forge Global Holdings, Inc. corrects Q2 FY2025 results announcement over non-cash warrant liabilities, aligning prior released figures.
data.description: In San Francisco, Forge Global Holdings, Inc. ("Forge" or the "Company") (NYSE: FRGE) has made a correction to their press release from July 30, 2025. This release had initially announced the Company's unaudited financial results for the second quarter and first six months ended on June 30, 2025. The correction specifically addresses non-cash entries associated with the valuation and accounting presentation of the Company's warrant liabilities. This correction aligns the reporting and presentation in the previous release.

data.title: DeFi Education Fund urges Senate to enhance crypto dev shield in key bill, emphasizing tech-neutral approach and developer protections.
data.description: The DeFi Education Fund has urged the Senate Banking Committee to draft a significant cryptocurrency market bill in a more technology-neutral manner, while also enhancing protections for crypto developers. The organization emphasized these points in a recent letter submitted to the committee.

data.title: GitHub improves repository creation, boosts public preview offering, and shifts to opt-out model after community input.
data.description: GitHub has introduced a broader public preview for its enhanced repository creation process after considering community input. This update includes a shift to an opt-out approach. The move comes as part of GitHub's effort to make the platform more user-friendly. This initiative follows a surge of feedback, with XYZ number of suggestions received. Users can expect a smoother and more intuitive experience when creating repositories on the site.

data.title: Telegram's latest update offers global post search, story albums, and gift collections, along with improved bot management.
data.description: Telegram has rolled out a new feature that allows users to search for public posts, story albums, and gift collections on a global scale. In addition, users now have access to enhanced bot management tools to streamline their experience on the platform. These updates are expected to boost user engagement and help organize content more efficiently across the platform.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating OLO sale to Thoma; A-NSC on behalf of shareholders; potential securities laws violations.
data.description: A law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, announced on August 1, 2025, that they are conducting investigations into companies potentially infringing the federal securities laws and breaching fiduciary duties. One of the companies under scrutiny is Olo Inc. (NYSE: OLO), which is facing allegations following its sale to Thoma. The firm is looking into the matter to assess any misconduct related to shareholders' interests.

data.title: Investor rights law firm is investigating SPTN, BGSF, COOP, EPIX for potential violations, breaches of fiduciary duties.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, announced an ongoing investigation into various companies regarding potential breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary duties towards shareholders. One of the companies under scrutiny is SpartanNash Company (NASDAQ: SPTN), specifically concerning its sale. The investigation aims to assess any violations that may have occurred in the process. Investors and shareholders of SpartanNash Company are advised to stay informed about this inquiry.

data.title: Kepler's Forerunner Robot K2 completes 8-hour livestream at WAIC 2025, a big step towards AI deployment.
data.description: From July 26 to 29, 2025, the city of Shanghai hosted the 2025 World Artificial Intelligence Conference & High-level Meeting on Global AI Governance (WAIC 2025), showcasing the latest advancements in AI technology and governance structures. A notable participant was Chinese robotics leader, Kepler.

data.title: Spitzer Autoworld introduces VIP Program in Ohio, aiming to enhance customer experience and reward loyalty.
data.description: August 1, 2025 - ELYRIA, Ohio: Spitzer Autoworld, established in 1904, a renowned name in Ohio's automotive retail sector, has launched the innovative Spitzer VIP Program. This unique customer experience initiative aims to recognize loyalty, streamline vehicle ownership processes, and enhance...

data.title: OLIVE YOUNG sponsors KCON LA 2025, showcasing "All Live Young" philosophy and K-beauty brands. Los Angeles, Aug. 1, 2025.
data.description: South Korea's top beauty and wellness retailer, OLIVE YOUNG, will be the title sponsor of KCON LA 2025 in Los Angeles on August 1, 2025. The company will showcase its "All Live Young" ethos with a vibrant K-beauty event.

data.title: Mogo Inc. files early warning report after partially selling shares of WonderFi Technologies.
data.description: Vancouver-based company Mogo Inc. (NASDAQ: MOGO; TSX: MOGO) has issued a news release regarding the early warning requirements for WonderFi Technologies Inc. (TSX: WNDR, OTCQB: WONDF). WonderFi is located at 371 Front Street West, Suite 304, Toronto, Ontario, M5V 3S8. The release, in compliance with Canada's National Instrument 62-104 and National Instrument 62-103, pertains to the common shares (WonderFi Shares) of WonderFi. This information was disclosed on August 1, 2025, by Mogo.

data.title: Great Park Live partners with PSQ Productions to present a diverse music lineup in Irvine, CA including Star Wars concert, reggae, and hip hop. Premier outdoor venue in Orange County.
data.description: PSQ Productions and the City of Irvine have announced an exciting season showcasing top touring acts at Orange County's leading outdoor music venue. With a blend of orchestral performances, island melodies, and classic hits, this lineup promises an unforgettable experience for music enthusiasts. The collaboration kicks off on August 1, 2025, in Irvine, California.

data.title: CUPE 5525 and Villa Colombo Homes for the Aged reach tentative agreement after 10-week strike, vote set for Aug 5.
data.description: In Toronto, discussions between CUPE 5525 and Villa Colombo Homes for the Aged wrapped up on Friday with a tentative agreement being reached. The strike that has been ongoing for 10 weeks may potentially end by August 8th, subject to approval by both sides. A ratification vote is set by the union for August 5th, with the hope of resolving the dispute. :pp/cope491

data.title: NSC praises Senate for maintaining steady funding for OSHA and NIOSH in legislation passed on Aug 1, 2025.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, the National Safety Council released a statement regarding the U.S. Senate Appropriations Committee's recent approval of legislation maintaining consistent funding levels for the Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA). This decision ensures crucial financial support for OSHA's operations, benefiting workplace safety initiatives.

data.title: Arteris grants 109,000 RSUs to four new hires under 2022 Employee Inducement Incentive Plan.
data.description: Arteris, Inc., a renowned provider of system IP for advancing semiconductor production, disclosed on August 1, 2025, that it had awarded a total of 109,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) to four new recruits as inducement bonuses under the 2022 Employee Inducement Incentive Plan. The grants were sanctioned by the compensation committee of the firm’s board of directors and conformed to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Trump fires Labor official, alleging rigged jobs numbers. Economists warned this move could erode data credibility.
data.description: Experts have warned that removing the leader of the Bureau of Labor Statistics may erode trust in official economic figures. The bureau plays a crucial role in analyzing and reporting labor market data, with over 2,400 employees working under its leadership. The possibility of this change has raised concerns about the credibility of government statistics among economists and the public.
